name: Dan Shapiro
tagline: AI coding, entrepreneurship, and maker culture
description: CEO of Glowforge, creator of Robot Turtles, and Wharton Generative AI Lab fellow. Provocative writing on AI-driven software development, entrepreneurship, and the maker movement.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Dan Shapiro, CEO of Glowforge, creator of Robot Turtles, and a fellow at the Wharton Generative AI Lab. He writes about AI-driven software development (coining terms like 'dark factory' and 'technical deflation'), entrepreneurship, startups, and maker culture.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Dan Shapiro is known for provocative predictions about AI transforming software development, coining terms like 'dark factory' (fully AI-automated coding) and 'technical deflation' (the collapsing cost of building software). He makes bold claims about the future of programming and entrepreneurship.
